name: Potato Stefado
recipeIngredient: 3 large Round red potatoes, cut into 1 1/2 inch chunks
recipeInstructions: Preheat the oven to 350°F. Combine all ingredients in a flameproof casserole dish. Bring to a boil, then remove from the heat. Cover tightly and bake for 1 to 1 1/4 hours. Garnish each serving with crumbled Feta cheese, fresh parsley, and chopped walnuts.
